guilds.name: The Indigenous Plants
guilds.note: Heavily shaded from the west by neighbours barn. One of the cherry trees is old and tall. The other is a few years old, good rootstock candidate to graft on.

guilds.name: Old Mix 2
guilds.note:
the peach, unknown cultivar, actually died out and a new branch started growing bellow the cut
service tree was there for a while, but didn't notice. it's growing bush shaped and has no fruit or flowers yet.
raspberry and blackberry, I'm unsure of exact cultivars, best guess

guilds.name: Karmelitska Reneta i Kupine
guilds.note: The apple is extremely tall and I had to add scaffolding, as it has 4-5 fruits right at the top.

guilds.name: Volunteer WIllow
guilds.note: Really young volunteer "cica maca" willow. Probably won't make it, but will be replaced in that case. North of the property, center of northern edge. A batch of wild rocket arugula is sawn on the northern edge of the guild.

guilds.name: Meteor Cherry
guilds.note: Right next to Moretinni Pear, but unmulched. Probably gonna merge them together.

guilds.name: Elderberry Patch
guilds.note: 6 cuttings. I expect maybe 1-2 actually make it
